raw_gap_stats.notes: df_sui_missing counts events where RAW sui absent; supplement.sqlite does NOT change these checks.

supplement_totals_seen_on_any_event_iter.events_dual_note: Per manifest (dataset_label, event_id): event has at least one football-data row and one openfootball row in supplement. Usually 0 because UEFA datasets only receive OpenFootball merges and domestic leagues only football-data in the default pipeline.

tier_b_model_hints.footnote: football-data + openfootball supply results/some aggregates; neither replaces df_li XI.

raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.full_manifest_flashscore_raw_repair: python scripts/data_integrity_flashscore.py --repair          # df_sui + df_st + df_li gaps
raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.subset_lineups_only: python scripts/data_integrity_flashscore.py --repair --repair-feeds li # lineup gaps only
raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.script_backfill_li_convenience: python scripts/backfill_lineups.py  # delegates to filtered repair(li)
raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.df_li_legacy_cli: python -m football_ai backfill-flashscore-lineups (single IDS file + out-subdir).
raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.df_st: Use full --repair or --repair-feeds st; Flashscore supplement never replaces df_st.
raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.fixture_uid_migration_note: After pulling new writers, python scripts/migrate_supplement_fixture_uid.py (creates dated .bak + fills fixture_uid on legacy rows).
raw_backfill_and_repair_hints.note: Repair does not guarantee non-empty upstream responses — compare gap-stats before vs after.

three_source_coverage_note: Flashscore RAW + football-data supplement + OpenFootball UEFA text cover different fields; full stat/XI parity requires complete df_* RAW plus successful joins (see metrics above).
integration_pipeline_hint: UEFA/OpenFootball merge needs AA÷ meta for each IDS event_id; global mega f_1_-1_* often omits UEFA CL/EL. Run scripts/download_flashscore_uefa_results_seeds.py → data/raw/flashscore/seed_results/*_wyniki.html (embedded AA rows from /wyniki/ pages), plus optional manifest feed keys, slice_flashscore_list_feed.py, or capture list-feed via football_ai download-flashscore-from-feed into feeds/. OpenFootball plaintext may list fewer fixtures than IDS; see openfootball_uefa_overlay ratios. Each download_openfootball allowlist run writes data/integrated/openfootball_source_status.json (urls_tried, url_resolved optional, unavailable vs ok). Fallback URLs: data/integrated/openfootball_url_fallbacks.json (by github season_folder and kind).After merge, classify remaining gaps with scripts/download_openfootball_allowlist.py --openfoot-miss-report data/integrated/openfootball_miss_latest.json (prints openfoot_no_hit_breakdown). Scripts: download_flashscore_integration_feeds.py, build_integration_supplement.py, download_openfootball_allowlist.py.

football_data_integration_scope.included_in_build_integration_supplement: domestic leagues mapped in join_football_data.LEAG_KEY_TO_CLI plus Poland Ekstraklasa POL aggregation plus optional leagues in data/integrated/football_data_manifest_mmz_overlay.json (MMZ filename stem)
football_data_integration_scope.excluded: UEFA (liga_* manifest keys): no bundled football-data MMZ analogue; overlays may still target cups via the JSON map after manual URL validation.

supplement_match_identity.match_uid_dual_metric_note: match_uid includes dataset_label in the hash (see match_identity.compute_match_uid). UEFA supplement rows use liga_mistrzow-* etc.; football-data rows use premier_league-* etc. The pipeline never writes both sources for the same dataset_label, so match_uids_with_both_fd_and_openfootball is expected to be 0; it is not a global integration KPI.
supplement_match_identity.fixture_uid_cross_source_note: fixture_uid is UTC calendar date plus norm_club home/away (see compute_fixture_uid). It may collide across unrelated same-day fixtures—fixture_uid KPIs exclude UEFA dataset GLOB liga_* when reporting domestic FD+OF co-occurrence.

experimental_cross_source_date_norm_pair.disclaimer: Experimental cross-competition proxy: same UTC calendar date and same sorted norm_club pair with at least one football-data row and one openfootball row. Can double-count or mis-link (e.g. domestic vs European fixture same names).

domestic_cups_seed_html_and_raw_fraction.metric_note: aa_meta_rich_coverage_fraction_seed_html_only intersects IDS with iter_match_meta_from_feed(parsed seed); build_integration_supplement loads mega-feeds before augment_meta_index_from_seed_html — final meta_ix differs.
domestic_cups_seed_html_and_raw_fraction.sqlite_hints:
-- supplement.sqlite: domestic cups by dataset prefix
SELECT substr(dataset, 1, 30) ds, COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT event_id)
FROM supplement
WHERE dataset LIKE 'fa_cup-%'
   OR dataset LIKE 'carabao_cup-%'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT source FROM supplement WHERE dataset LIKE 'fa_cup-%' OR dataset LIKE 'carabao_cup-%' LIMIT 20;

fa_cup_carabao_jalapic_index_snapshot.note: Empty buckets for sy>=2022 with current jalapic CSVs is expected.
